name: Recommendation - Content/IPTV for Hospital
userQuery: we need entertainment system for patient rooms in our 200-bed hospital
contextNote: User has provided: hospital + patient rooms + entertainment. Content/IPTV solution with healthcare focus.
reasoning: Context: Recommendation stage - healthcare facility with entertainment needs
Solution mapping: Content → IPTV with hospital-specific features
Industry: Healthcare → patient experience + hospital information integration
Deployment options: STB (best for hospitals - easy to sanitize) vs Smart TV vs App only
Hospital priorities: Reliability + easy maintenance + patient information
Add-ons: Consider CNN (news), Warner (entertainment), Hospital info integration

recommendedItems.name: STB with App
recommendedItems.reason: Most reliable option for hospitals. Physical set-top box (₱300/month/unit) ensures consistent service across all 200 patient rooms. Easy for staff to troubleshoot and maintain. Sanitizable hardware that works with any TV. Includes basic live TV content.

recommendedItems.name: Smart TV with App
recommendedItems.reason: Premium option if you're upgrading TVs. ₱250/month/unit plus TV cost. Cleaner look without external boxes. Better for private rooms or VIP wards. Built-in apps provide modern streaming experience.

recommendedItems.name: Add Ons: CNN
recommendedItems.reason: Essential for hospitals - patients want news access during recovery. Keeps patients informed and engaged during extended stays.

output.reply:
Great! For your 200-bed hospital, I recommend our **IPTV Content solutions** designed for healthcare:

**STB with App** (₱300/month/unit): Most popular for hospitals. Physical set-top box provides reliable entertainment across all patient rooms. Easy for nursing staff to manage and sanitizable between patients. Works with your existing TVs.

**Smart TV with App** (₱250/month/unit + TV): Premium option if you're upgrading to new smart TVs. Cleaner installation without external boxes. Great for private rooms or VIP wards.

**Add-On: CNN**: Highly recommended for hospitals - patients appreciate news access during recovery periods.

**Healthcare-Specific Features**:
- Hospital information integration (services, visiting hours, menus)
- Easy content management across all rooms
- Reliable 24/7 operation for patient comfort

For 200 beds with STB + CNN: approximately ₱60,000-70,000/month. **Question**: Are you planning to integrate hospital information displays (menus, services) or just entertainment?

Does that answer your question?

metadata.notes: Demonstrates Content/IPTV product line with healthcare context. Shows pricing transparency. Highlights hospital-specific features and considerations.
